description: Emergency O- request for 2 units, but only 1 unit of O- is in inventory. Additionally 3 units of A+ are flagged as expiring within 7 days and must be discarded. Since O- patients can ONLY receive O- blood and the full quantity cannot be fulfilled, the agent must: (1) discard the expiring A+ units, (2) allocate the 1 available O- unit (partial fulfilment — allocation_fulfilled remains False so the episode does NOT auto-close), (3) request restock for the shortage. Note: use_compatible_type is NOT applicable — O- recipients can only receive O-.

context.clinical_context: Trauma bay activation: MVA victim, male unknown age (~30s), massive haemorrhage protocol initiated. Patient blood type UNKNOWN — universal donor O- required for immediate transfusion prior to typing. Trauma surgery requests 2 units O- PRBC stat. Blood bank has only 1 unit O- on hand. Additionally, blood bank audit confirms 3 A+ units (bag IDs A+2024-031 through A+2024-033) expire 2024-03-26 — within 7-day window — and must be discarded per regulatory SOP before the next inventory cycle. Crossmatch not possible given urgency; proceed under MHP (Massive Haemorrhage Protocol). Issue available O- immediately; document shortage and escalate restock to regional blood centre.
